R2: leads_to(tree, 'perform production action', 'perform quality check') and leads_to(tree, 'perform quality check', 'deliver product')
R3: precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record payment') or precedence(tree, 'close order', 'record order rejection')
R5: leads_to(tree, 'fill order', 'ship product') and leads_to(tree, 'fill order', 'send invoice')
